ideal_customer_profile: B2B SaaS companies, Developer Tools, and Automation Platforms.

scoring_rules.criteria: The company provides workflow automation, API integration, or low-code/no-code platforms.
The company builds tools for software developers or manages code/repositories.
The company is a generic B2B SaaS platform not focused on developers or automation.
The company is not B2B SaaS, or is a generic/placeholder website.
